We earn a small commission when you buy through them, at no extra cost to you. As an Amazon Associate we earn from qualifying purchases. See our ",["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/disclaimer","className":"text-orange-600 dark:text-orange-400 hover:underline","children":"disclaimer"}]," for details."]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose","children":[["$","h2","0",{"id":"the-audio-question-everyone-has","children":"The Audio Question Everyone Has"}],["$","p","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"If you work from home or in an open office, audio is not optional — it is infrastructure. Whether you are blocking out background noise, taking calls, or just signalling to the world that you are in focus mode, the device on your ears shapes your entire day."}}],"$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc","$Ld","$Le","$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19","$L1a","$L1b","$L1c","$L1d","$L1e"]}],"$L1f","$L20","$L21"]}],"$L22"]}]]}]
7:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/0wu484j-81s3l.js","async":true}]
8:["$","$L23",null,{"children":["$","$24",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@25"}]}]
9:["$","p","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"The question is not which is better. The question is which is better for you and how you work."}}]
a:["$","h2","3",{"id":"the-case-for-over-ear-headphones","children":"The Case for Over-Ear Headphones"}]
b:["$","p","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Noise cancellation is stronger.</strong> Over-ear headphones have larger drivers and more physical mass to attenuate sound. Premium over-ear headphones (Sony XM5, Bose QC45) effectively silence open offices, cafés, and home environments."}}]
c:["$","p","5",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>More comfortable for very long sessions.</strong> This is counterintuitive — headphones feel heavier. But pressure is distributed across the head and ears rather than concentrated in the ear canal. Most people find over-ear headphones more comfortable after four-plus hours."}}]
d:["$","p","6",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Better sound quality.</strong> For music, podcasts, and general listening, over-ear headphones produce richer, more spacious sound."}}]
e:["$","p","7",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Best over-ear picks:</strong>"}}]
f:["$","ul","8",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<em>Sony WH-1000XM5</em>: The benchmark for ANC. Superb noise cancellation, excellent sound, comfortable for long sessions."}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<em>Bose QuietComfort 45</em>: Softer, lighter than Sony. Slightly less aggressive ANC but outstanding comfort."}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<em>Apple AirPods Max</em>: Exceptional sound and ANC. Best if you are deeply in the Apple ecosystem."}}]]}]
10:["$","h2","9",{"id":"the-case-for-earbuds","children":"The Case for Earbuds"}]
11:["$","p","10",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Portability and convenience.</strong> Earbuds go in your pocket or bag without a case taking up space. On-the-go switching between desk, meeting room, and commute is frictionless."}}]
12:["$","p","11",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Better for calls in many situations.</strong> Modern earbuds have microphones positioned closer to the mouth, which often results in better call clarity than the boom-free mics on over-ear headphones."}}]
13:["$","p","12",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Less fatiguing for people with glasses.</strong> Over-ear headphones press on glasses frames. After hours this becomes genuinely uncomfortable. Earbuds have no such conflict."}}]
14:["$","p","13",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Best earbud picks:</strong>"}}]
15:["$","ul","14",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<em>Apple AirPods Pro 2</em>: Outstanding ANC for the form factor. Excellent call quality. Essential if you use an iPhone."}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<em>Sony WF-1000XM5</em>: The best Android/cross-platform earbuds. Superb ANC, very good sound."}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<em>Jabra Evolve2 55</em>: Designed specifically for work calls. Exceptional microphone quality. The choice of professionals who live on video calls."}}]]}]
16:["$","h2","15",{"id":"hybrid-approach","children":"Hybrid Approach"}]
17:["$","p","16",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Many serious remote workers use both: over-ear headphones for deep focus sessions (blocking out everything, listening to music or ambient sound), and earbuds for calls and movement around the home."}}]
18:["$","p","17",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"If budget allows, this is genuinely the best solution."}}]
19:["$","h2","18",{"id":"what-about-open-back-headphones","children":"What About Open-Back Headphones?"}]
1a:["$","p","19",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Open-back headphones (Sennheiser HD600, Beyerdynamic DT990) offer remarkable sound quality but provide no noise isolation — sound leaks in and out freely. They are excellent for solo work in quiet environments but unsuitable for calls or open offices."}}]
1b:["$","h2","20",{"id":"microphone-reality-check","children":"Microphone Reality Check"}]
1c:["$","p","21",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"Neither earbuds nor headphones with built-in microphones match the call quality of a dedicated USB microphone. If you spend significant time on video calls and quality matters, a simple condenser microphone (Blue Yeti Nano, Elgato Wave:3) is worth adding to your setup regardless of which headphones you choose."}}]
1d:["$","h2","22",{"id":"the-verdict","children":"The Verdict"}]
1e:["$","ul","23",{"children":[["$","li","0",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Long focused work sessions</strong> → Over-ear headphones"}}],["$","li","1",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Frequent calls, movement, commuting</strong> → Earbuds"}}],["$","li","2",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Glasses wearer doing long sessions</strong> → Earbuds"}}],["$","li","3",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Best sound quality</strong> → Over-ear headphones"}}],["$","li","4",{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<strong>Open office or café</strong> → Either, with strong ANC"}}]]}]
1f:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-10 pt-8 border-t border-stone-200 dark:border-stone-800 flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-stone-500 dark:text-stone-400","children":"Topic:"}],["$","$L3",null,{"href":"/blog?category=Gear","className":"text-sm font-semibold px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-orange-50 text-orange-700 hover:opacity-80 transition-opacity","children":"Gear"}],[["$","$L3","headphones",{"href":"/blog/tag/headphones","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","headphones"]}],["$","$L3","earbuds",{"href":"/blog/tag/earbuds","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","earbuds"]}],["$","$L3","audio",{"href":"/blog/tag/audio","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","audio"]}],["$","$L3","focus",{"href":"/blog/tag/focus","className":"text-sm font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-stone-100 dark:bg-stone-800 text-stone-600 dark:text-stone-300 hover:bg-orange-50 dark:hover:bg-orange-900/30 hover:text-orange-600 dark:hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors","children":["#","focus"]}]]]}]
20:["$","$L26",null,{"title":"Headphones vs. Earbuds for Work: An Honest Comparison","slug":"headphones-vs-earbuds-for-work"}]
